question: Get customers with sales rep names
ground_truth_sql: SELECT c."customerName", e."firstName", e."lastName" FROM customers c LEFT JOIN employees e ON c."salesRepEmployeeNumber" = e."employeeNumber";

question: Get orders with customer city
ground_truth_sql: SELECT o."orderNumber", o."orderDate", o."status", c."city" FROM orders o JOIN customers c ON o."customerNumber" = c."customerNumber";

question: Get employees and their manager
ground_truth_sql: SELECT e."firstName" AS employee_first_name, e."lastName" AS employee_last_name, m."firstName" AS manager_first_name, m."lastName" AS manager_last_name FROM employees e LEFT JOIN employees m ON e."reportsTo" = m."employeeNumber";
brief_explanation: Retrieve employees with their manager names

question: Get payments with customer country
ground_truth_sql: SELECT p."checkNumber", p."paymentDate", p."amount", c."country" FROM payments p JOIN customers c ON p."customerNumber" = c."customerNumber";

question: Count customers per country
ground_truth_sql: SELECT "country", COUNT("customerNumber") AS customer_count FROM customers GROUP BY "country" ORDER BY customer_count DESC, "country";

question: Total payments per customer
ground_truth_sql: SELECT c."customerName", SUM(p."amount") AS total_payments FROM payments p JOIN customers c ON p."customerNumber" = c."customerNumber" GROUP BY c."customerName" ORDER BY total_payments DESC;
result_summary: 98 rows; sample: [{"customerName": "Euro+ Shopping Channel", "total_payments": 715738.98}, {"customerName": "Mini Gifts Distributors Ltd.", "total_payments": 584188.24}, {"customerName": "Australian Collectors, Co.", "total_payments": 180585.07}]
brief_explanation: Calculate total payment amount per customer

question: Number of orders per status
ground_truth_sql: SELECT "status", COUNT("orderNumber") AS order_count FROM orders GROUP BY "status" ORDER BY order_count DESC, "status";

question: Products per product line
ground_truth_sql: SELECT "productLine", COUNT("productCode") AS product_count FROM products GROUP BY "productLine" ORDER BY product_count DESC, "productLine";
brief_explanation: Count products grouped by product line

question: Employees per office
ground_truth_sql: SELECT o."officeCode", o."city", COUNT(e."employeeNumber") AS employee_count FROM offices o LEFT JOIN employees e ON o."officeCode" = e."officeCode" GROUP BY o."officeCode", o."city" ORDER BY employee_count DESC, o."officeCode";

question: Total stock per product vendor
ground_truth_sql: SELECT "productVendor", SUM("quantityInStock") AS total_stock FROM products GROUP BY "productVendor" ORDER BY total_stock DESC, "productVendor";
result_summary: 13 rows; sample: [{"productVendor": "Gearbox Collectibles", "total_stock": 60495}, {"productVendor": "Min Lin Diecast", "total_stock": 50089}, {"productVendor": "Classic Metal Creations", "total_stock": 45408}]
brief_explanation: Calculate total stock grouped by product vendor

question: Average buy price per product line
ground_truth_sql: SELECT "productLine", ROUND(AVG("buyPrice"), 2) AS average_buy_price FROM products GROUP BY "productLine" ORDER BY "productLine";
brief_explanation: Calculate average buy price grouped by product line

question: Orders per customer
ground_truth_sql: SELECT c."customerName", COUNT(o."orderNumber") AS order_count FROM customers c LEFT JOIN orders o ON c."customerNumber" = o."customerNumber" GROUP BY c."customerName" ORDER BY order_count DESC, c."customerName";
result_summary: 122 rows; sample: [{"customerName": "Euro+ Shopping Channel", "order_count": 26}, {"customerName": "Mini Gifts Distributors Ltd.", "order_count": 17}, {"customerName": "Australian Collectors, Co.", "order_count": 5}]

question: Max MSRP per product line
ground_truth_sql: SELECT "productLine", MAX("MSRP") AS max_msrp FROM products GROUP BY "productLine" ORDER BY max_msrp DESC, "productLine";
brief_explanation: Find maximum MSRP grouped by product line

question: Min buy price per vendor
ground_truth_sql: SELECT "productVendor", MIN("buyPrice") AS min_buy_price FROM products GROUP BY "productVendor" ORDER BY min_buy_price ASC, "productVendor";
result_summary: 13 rows; sample: [{"productVendor": "Carousel DieCast Legends", "min_buy_price": 15.91}, {"productVendor": "Second Gear Diecast", "min_buy_price": 16.24}, {"productVendor": "Classic Metal Creations", "min_buy_price": 20.61}]
brief_explanation: Find minimum buy price grouped by vendor
